title: A picture of the dry bulk market
section_path: A picture of the dry bulk market
section_path_text: A picture of the dry bulk market
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
A year ago, Doric's Weekly Insight painted an upbeat picture of the dry bulk market, with the leading Capesize index surging past $20,000 daily and the Panamax sector nearly doubling its value from the prior year. The geared segments had also maintained strength, with Supramax and Handysize indices firmly in five-digit territory. One year later, the landscape has shifted dramatically, with the second week of February 2025 marked by a stark divergence between segments.
